blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,923 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
